sources.sql: 'SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COALESCE(SUM(market_value), 0) as total_value, COALESCE(AVG(cap_rate), 0) as avg_cap_rate, COALESCE(AVG(market_value / NULLIF(rentable_area_sf, 0)), 0) as avg_value_per_sf FROM properties'
'SELECT property_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM properties GROUP BY property_type'
'SELECT * FROM properties ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT %(limit)s OFFSET %(offset)s'
